   "reasoning": "We're bleeding teachers fast, and my primary concern is getting some back in the classroom. I'm willing to give bonuses and direct support a high priority. Meanwhile, stricter attendance rules will only create more problems. Counseling programs can help, but we can't replace the sheer number of teachers we're losing right now. Transparency is cheap and essential to rebuilding trust with parents.",
